prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion model. Using the current price ($41.60) and estimated daily parameters (drift of 0.0001 and volatility of 0.028, which annualizes to ~44%) over a 20-day period, the median price is calculated as the point estimate. Confidence intervals are derived from the quantiles of the resulting log-normal distribution.
